name: turso
description: Manage Turso Cloud (organizations, databases, groups) and run SQL from Codex via the hosted Turso MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Turso Cloud and run SQL from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Turso Cloud over the hosted MCP server. Manage organizations, databases, and groups, and run SQL, with OAuth login (no API token to copy).
